body:
gurobleedingblossom:

I’m so touch-starved that if someone touches my hand I’d blush and shiver

I mean heyyyy

I may have had a date a little while back and possibly moaned softly a little when I was touched in a non-sexual place…

I told her…“You have unlocked the touched starved princess!” Unfortunately, we had to wrap up after. 😞
